qa.overall_assessment: Dead code removal of auth-flag references from 3 hook files. Both ACs independently verified by QA grep. Syntax check passes. Provenance confirmed against baseline SHA. No behavioral logic changed — pure cleanup.

success_criteria_results.details: Exit code 1, zero matches, empty stdout
success_criteria_results.evidence: grep exit code 1 — no auth-flag tokens found in any of the 3 hook files
